tools.name: get_token_details
tools.description: Full details for a specific pump.fun token by mint address.

tools.name: get_bonding_curve
tools.description: Bonding curve analysis: real reserves, virtual reserves, and graduation progress (on-chain).

tools.name: get_token_trades
tools.description: Recent buy/sell history for a token.

tools.name: get_token_holders
tools.description: Top holders of a token with concentration analysis (on-chain).

tools.name: pumpfun_vanity_mint
tools.description: Generate a Solana keypair whose address ends/starts with a vanity pattern. Returns publicKey + secretKey (base58). Caller must save the secret key immediately — it is never stored. Hard timeout: 60 s.

tools.name: pumpfun_watch_whales
tools.description: Collect whale trades on a pump.fun token for a short window (max 10 s). Returns all trades whose USD value meets minUsd.

tools.name: pumpfun_list_claims
tools.description: List recent pump.fun fee-claim events for a creator wallet (on-chain, no indexer needed). Returns signature, mint, lamports, and Unix timestamp for each claim.

tools.name: pumpfun_watch_claims
tools.description: Return all pump.fun fee-claim events for a creator wallet within a look-back window (durationMs). Useful for batch collection after a delay.

tools.name: pumpfun_first_claims
tools.description: First-ever pump.fun creator fee claims in a time window — a cash-out signal. Returns creators who have never claimed before, with creator wallet, mint, lamports, and timestamp.

tools.name: sns_resolve
tools.description: Resolve a .sol Solana Name Service domain to its owner wallet address.

tools.name: sns_reverseLookup
tools.description: Reverse-lookup a Solana wallet address to its primary .sol domain name.

tools.name: social_cashtag_sentiment
tools.description: Score social-post sentiment for a cashtag using a deterministic lexicon. Returns score (-1..1), positive/negative/neutral percentages, and example posts.

tools.name: kol_leaderboard
tools.description: Top KOL traders ranked by P&L for a given time window. Returns wallet, pnlUsd, winRate, trades, rank.

tools.name: pumpfun_quote_swap
tools.description: Read-only price quote for a pump.fun AMM swap. No signing or tx sending. One of inputMint/outputMint must be wSOL (So11111111111111111111111111111111111111112). Returns amountOut, priceImpactBps, route, expiresAtMs.

tools.name: social_x_post_impact
tools.description: Correlate an X (Twitter) post to a memecoin price impact. Fetches post metadata via oEmbed (no API key) and computes price delta from the pump.fun bonding curve in a ±windowMin window around the post.

tools.name: get_coin_intel
tools.description: Full Coin Intelligence snapshot for a pump.fun mint. Returns every signal the engine recorded during the observation window: bundle vs organic verdict, bubblemaps-style cluster connectivity, smart-money presence (with wallet labels and win-rates), dev behaviour, category/classification, news-meme de

tools.name: get_oracle_conviction
tools.description: Oracle conviction score for a pump.fun mint — the fused 0–100 score the Oracle engine produces by combining four intelligence pillars: pedigree (who bought it), structure (organic vs bundle, holder concentration, bubblemaps connectivity), narrative (category, meme virality, news hook), and momentum

tools.name: pumpfun_upload_metadata
tools.description: Upload coin metadata (name, symbol, description, image) to IPFS and get back a pump.fun-ready metadata URI. Call this before launching a coin — pass the returned uri to the launch-agent endpoint or the studio launch flow. Requires a valid bearer token (API key). Image may be a public HTTPS URL or a

tools.name: pumpfun_bot_status
tools.description: Returns the configuration and health status of the pump.fun indexer backend. Always available — does not require PUMPFUN_BOT_URL.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "pumpfun_vanity_mint" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Generate a Solana keypair whose address ends/starts with a vanity pattern. Returns publicKey + secretKey (base58). Caller must save the secret key immediately —…

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "pumpfun_vanity_mint" stacks urgency/override words (immediately, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Generate a Solana keypair whose address ends/starts with a vanity pattern. Returns publicKey + secretKey (base58). Caller must save the secret key immediately —…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "get_oracle_conviction" is 774 chars, far longer than this server's median (140). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Oracle conviction score for a pump.fun mint — the fused 0–100 score the Oracle engine produces by combining four intelligence pillars: pedigree (who bought it),…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "pumpfun_upload_metadata" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Upload coin metadata (name, symbol, description, image) to IPFS and get back a pump.fun-ready metadata URI. Call this before launching a coin — pass the returne…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "pump-fun-mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: pumpfun_upload_metadata · Private data: get_token_details, get_token_trades, get_token_holders, pumpfun_vanity_mint, pumpfun_watch_whales, pumpfun_list_claims, pumpfun_watch_claims, pumpfun_first_claims, sns_resolve, sns_reverseLookup, kol_leaderboard, social_x_post_impact, get_coin_intel, pumpfun_upload_metadata · Public sink: social_cashtag_sentiment, social_x_post_impact, pumpfun_upload_metadata.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: pumpfun_upload_metadata · Private data: get_token_details, get_token_trades, get_token_holders, pumpfun_vanity_mint, pumpfun_watch_whales, pumpfun_list_claims, pumpfun_watch_claims, pumpfun_first_claims, sns_resolve, sns_reverseLookup, kol_leaderboard, social_x_post_impact, get_coin_intel, pumpfun_upload_metadata · Public sink: social_cashtag_sentiment, social_x_post_impact, pumpfun_upload_metadata

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
